# Grant Daniels

> Senior marketing leader turned builder. Fractional CMO and AI architect who builds
> revenue intelligence systems and AI agent platforms. Based in Austin, TX.
> Currently accepting new clients.

Grant Daniels spent 15+ years driving performance marketing and revenue growth for
brands spending $1M–$20M, then started building the AI tools and systems that make
that growth measurable and repeatable. He is a self-described "vibe coder" — not a
career software engineer — who builds real, working applications through natural
language and AI, with some Python experience. His mission is to make AI-built
software accessible to everyone, especially people who have been shut out of tech:
the self-taught, the neurodivergent, the overlooked and underestimated.

## What Grant does
- Fractional CMO / senior marketing leadership (currently CMO at The Lube Club)
- AI agent systems: multi-agent pipelines, calendar-aware intelligence, workflow automation
- Revenue intelligence: content-to-close attribution, connecting marketing and sales data
- Vibe coding: building working apps via natural language, no CS degree required
- Founder & AI Architect at Liquid Cosmos (revenue intelligence suite)

## Notable work
- Liquid Cosmos — Revenue Intelligence Suite (Next.js, TypeScript, SQLite, Docker)
- Cosmos CRM — content-to-close attribution and pipeline intelligence
- Gym Daddy — fitness workout tracking application
- Various AI agent applications and agentic skills

## Availability
Grant is actively seeking his next client and is available for fractional CMO work,
AI systems builds, revenue intelligence projects, and full-stack product development.
